# Test Suite Summary

| Metric           | Count        |
| ---------------- | ------------ |
| Total test files | {totalFiles} |
| Total test cases | {totalCases} |

### E2E Tests

| Metric           | Count      |
| ---------------- | ---------- |
| Total test files | {e2eFiles} |
| Total test cases | {e2eCases} |

### Notes

> Test files are identified using Playwright naming conventions (`*.spec.ts`, `*.test.ts`).

> Test cases are counted from Playwright `test()` declarations.

> E2E metrics include only tests located in E2E-specific directories.

> Statistics are generated automatically from the current project structure.
